feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: On Evaluating Abstraction and Analogy in Humans and Machines
entry.content:
Authors: M Mitchell - Current Directions in Psychological Science, 2026

Abstract: This article reviews two case studies in which AI systems were evaluated for abstraction and analogy-making capabilities and compared with those of humans. These studies illustrate how AI systems should be evaluated not only for accuracy on ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Melanie Mitchell (author alert)

entry.title: Biophysical modeling of excitation/inhibition balance and conversion to psychosis in the clinical high risk syndrome
entry.content:
Authors: J Rodriguez-Sanchez, DJ Hauke, D Pinotsis... - Biological Psychiatry, 2026

Abstract: Background Reduced mismatch negativity (MMN) and P300 event-related potential (ERP) components are widely replicated in schizophrenia and are also observed in individuals at clinical high risk for psychosis (CHR-P) who subsequently convert to ...

Alert: Karl Friston (author alert)

entry.title: NeuroAI and Beyond: Bridging Between Advances in Neuroscience and ArtificialIntelligence
entry.content:
Authors: A Zador, JM Fellous, T Sejnowski, G Adam, JB Aimone... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Neuroscience and Artificial Intelligence (AI) have made impressive progress in recent years but remain only loosely interconnected. Based on a workshop convened by the National Science Foundation in August 2025, we identify three ...

Alert: James B Aimone (author alert)

entry.title: Characterizing Earth analogs may require a moderate or high-resolution spectrograph
entry.content:
Authors: JB Ruffio, S Steiger, C Spohn, B Macintosh, D Mawet... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: A primary goal of the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) is to detect and measure the abundance of biosignature molecules, such as water (H2O) and oxygen (O2), in the atmosphere of Earth analogs. This is expected to require deep spectroscopic ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Renyu Hu (author alert)
